installCommand: if [ -d web/landing ]; then APP_DIR=web/landing; elif [ -d landing ]; then APP_DIR=landing; else echo 'landing app not found' && exit 1; fi; cd "$APP_DIR" && npm install
buildCommand: ROOT_DIR=$(pwd); if [ -d web/landing ]; then APP_DIR=web/landing; elif [ -d landing ]; then APP_DIR=landing; else echo 'landing app not found' && exit 1; fi; cd "$APP_DIR" && npm run build; cd "$ROOT_DIR"; rm -rf dist; mkdir -p dist; cp -R "$APP_DIR/dist/." dist/
